title: UAF in in Tab::OnMouseReleased(class ui::MouseEvent const &) in browser process
bounty_rationale: report of moderately mitigated memory corruption in a non-sandboxed process
description_snippet:
VULNERABILITY DETAILS
The core issue occurs in the Tab::OnMouseReleased method where the code attempts to access an object after it has been freed.

VERSION
Chromium	136.0.7054.0 (Developer Build) (64-bit) 
OS	Windows 11 Version 24H2 (Build 26120.3360)

REPRODUCTION CASE
